backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the ICP backend with lease listing CRUD operations (admin-only) and user profile management, using role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that TutorialsSection.tsx was updated to display exactly two YouTube Shorts embeds (replacing three), with high confidence and a single test requirement.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with viewport meta, SEO description for the ULO Mobile Edge Network app, and a root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with two routes: the homepage (/) and admin dashboard (/admin), both wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AdminLeaseListTa: Admin table component for managing lease listings with inline editing of all fields, delete confirmation dialog, loading skeletons, and toast notifications for mutations.
Header authentication button that shows a Lock/Admin Only button when logged out, a Dashboard button for verified admins, and a Logout button when authenticated, with auto-redirect to /admin on successful admin login.
frontend/src/components/AppDownloadButto: Renders App Store and Google Play download badge images as external links with hover opacity effects.
A form component for admins to create new lease listings by submitting a nickname, UUID lease code, and split ratio, with validation and mutation via useCreateLeaseListing hook.
frontend/src/components/FAQSection.tsx: Renders a FAQ section with eight accordion items covering topics like lease code usage, rewards, device compatibility, and split ratios for the Unity Network.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with branding, quick navigation links, an X (Twitter) social link, and App Store/Google Play download badges.
Displays a glossary section with cards defining six key Unity ecosystem terms such as UNO, ULO, Lease Code, and Split Ratio.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with the Unity Nodes logo, site title, and an admin-only button, with logo click navigating to the home route.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a shared Header, Footer, and a main content area rendered via TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LeaseListings.ts: Public-facing component that fetches and displays lease listings in a grid, showing partial lease codes, split ratios, availability badges, and a copy-to-clipboard button; nicknames are intentionally hidden.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status, redirecting unauthorized users to the home page with a toast error while showing a loading spinner during verification.
frontend/src/components/RequirementsSect: Displays a two-card requirements section listing a compatible smartphone and stable internet connection as prerequisites for Unity leasing.
frontend/src/components/RewardsSection.t: Displays a two-card section explaining the Unity network rewards structure, covering the general 75% ULO split and customized lease split ratios.
frontend/src/components/SetupGuideSectio: Renders a three-step setup guide (download app, claim lease code, enter code) as numbered cards to help users get started with Unity.
frontend/src/components/TasksSection.tsx: Shows three task cards (Verification, Monitoring, Maintenance) describing key activities for Unity License Operators to maximize earnings.
frontend/src/components/TutorialsSection: Embeds two YouTube Shorts tutorials about Unity Nodes in a responsive grid and includes a link to the full YouTube Shorts channel.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching lease listings, checking admin status, managing user profiles, and CRUD operations on lease listings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes, and applies base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page protected by ProtectedRoute that renders the lease creation form and admin lease list table with a toast notification provider.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page component that assembles the full page layout, including a hero banner, app download CTA, lease listings, setup guide, requirements, tasks, rewards, tutorials, FAQ, and glossary sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom colors, border radii, shadows, spacing, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and feature history, noting the current state where the TutorialsSection was updated to show exactly two specific YouTube Shorts videos replacing the previous three.
